TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_basketball, title = basketball, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/basketball} }

S.FORM: basketball nu Amuhuwan a sasakama, lanciw nu Sakizaya a kamu. kakiliman a mimali tu lanciw a tusaay ku kabut milabu sa, anu mimali kina lanciwan u tanayaay a sapimali, anu tahkal mimali lima aca ku tademaw mimali, kina mali taneng misaliwliw tatacuwa a mipakah mimali atu kulukulud atu mikili tu mali, kian mali kanca a mitemec tu tumaan amimaliay, anu mimali tu matatemec mipuluh tu tumaay a mimaliay, kya makaala tu sapitemec. kina lanciw i kitaki u sakaydihan nu katuuday mimali kuynian, nama 1936 a mihcaan malingatu aoyunhui malalucek a mitademecay a mammalian, i tini pakatuluay a hun nu ulic makawait tu mali tusaay ku nikaalaan tu nikatemecan, anu i tuluay nu hun a ulic miwait tuluay ku nikawaitan a nikaalaan. anu mamin matademec sa, anu cima ku sayadahay ani waitan wyda ku kata, anu malecad ku nikaalaan sa misatanayu aca midademec, anu mimali hen, u mimaliay taneng matulin mimali (hayni pimali i lalad, pasayni i udip nu lima sa) kya malingatu madupa a mipapeli i dumaan a tademaw, anu papeli i dumaan a mimaliyay, anu muculil (ya mimaliay sa, anu caay pimali muculil aca tu mipimaliay kina kakawawan), anu pelihen ku mali atu kina tusa mimali sa patelacay kuynian. nilacul
S.PHON: bask…ôtbar~…ær~…æ nu amuƒßuwan a sasakama, r~…æan ¶iw nu sakizaja a kamu. kakir~…æiman a mimar~…æi tu r~…æan ¶iw a tusaaj ku kabut mir~…æabu sa, anu mimar~…æi kina r~…æan ¶iwan u tanajaaj a sapimar~…æi, anu taƒßkar~…æ mimar~…æi r~…æima a ¶a ku tad…ômaw mimar~…æi, kina mar~…æi tan…ô≈ã misar~…æiwr~…æiw tata ¶uwa a mipakaƒß mimar~…æi atu kur~…æukur~…æud atu mikir~…æi tu mar~…æi, kian mar~…æi kan ¶a a mit…ôm…ô ¶ tu tumaan amimar~…æiaj, anu mimar~…æi tu matat…ôm…ô ¶ mipur~…æuƒß tu tumaaj a mimar~…æiaj, kja makaar~…æa tu sapit…ôm…ô ¶. kina r~…æan ¶iw i kitaki u sakajdiƒßan nu katuudaj mimar~…æi kujnian, nama **** a miƒß ¶aan mar~…æi≈ãatu aojunƒßui mar~…æar~…æu ¶…ôk a mitad…ôm…ô ¶aj a mammar~…æian, i tini pakatur~…æuaj a ƒßun nu ur~…æi ¶ makawait tu mar~…æi tusaaj ku nikaar~…æaan tu nikat…ôm…ô ¶an, anu i tur~…æuaj nu ƒßun a ur~…æi ¶ miwait tur~…æuaj ku nikawaitan a nikaar~…æaan. anu mamin matad…ôm…ô ¶ sa, anu ¶ima ku sajadaƒßaj ani waitan wjda ku kata, anu mar~…æ…ô ¶ad ku nikaar~…æaan sa misatanaju a ¶a midad…ôm…ô ¶, anu mimar~…æi ƒß…ôn, u mimar~…æiaj tan…ô≈ã matur~…æin mimar~…æi (ƒßajni pimar~…æi i r~…æar~…æad, pasajni i udip nu r~…æima sa) kja mar~…æi≈ãatu madupa a mipap…ôr~…æi i dumaan a tad…ômaw, anu pap…ôr~…æi i dumaan a mimar~…æijaj, anu mu ¶ur~…æir~…æ (ja mimar~…æiaj sa, anu ¶aaj pimar~…æi mu ¶ur~…æir~…æ a ¶a tu mipimar~…æiaj kina kakawawan), anu p…ôr~…æiƒß…ôn ku mar~…æi atu kina tusa mimar~…æi sa pat…ôr~…æa ¶aj kujnian. nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ
S.FORM: basketball nu Amuhuwan a sasakama, lanciw nu Sakizaya a kamu. kakiliman a mimali tu lanciw a tusaay ku kabut milabu sa, anu mimali kina lanciwan u tanayaay a sapimali, anu tahkal mimali lima aca ku tademaw mimali, kina mali taneng misaliwliw tatacuwa a mipakah mimali atu kulukulud atu mikili tu mali, kian mali kanca a mitemec tu tumaan amimaliay, anu mimali tu matatemec mipuluh tu tumaay a mimaliay, kya makaala tu sapitemec. kina lanciw i kitaki u sakaydihan nu katuuday mimali kuynian, nama 1936 a mihcaan malingatu aoyunhui malalucek a mitademecay a mammalian, i tini pakatuluay a hun nu ulic makawait tu mali tusaay ku nikaalaan tu nikatemecan, anu i tuluay nu hun a ulic miwait tuluay ku nikawaitan a nikaalaan. anu mamin matademec sa, anu cima ku sayadahay ani waitan wyda ku kata, anu malecad ku nikaalaan sa misatanayu aca midademec, anu mimali hen, u mimaliay taneng matulin mimali (hayni pimali i lalad, pasayni i udip nu lima sa) kya malingatu madupa a mipapeli i dumaan a tademaw, anu papeli i dumaan a mimaliyay, anu muculil (ya mimaliay sa, anu caay pimali muculil aca tu mipimaliay kina kakawawan), anu pelihen ku mali atu kina tusa mimali sa patelacay kuynian. nilacul
S.PHON: bask…ôtbar~…ær~…æ nu amuƒßuwan a sasakama, r~…æan ¶iw nu sakizaja a kamu. kakir~…æiman a mimar~…æi tu r~…æan ¶iw a tusaaj ku kabut mir~…æabu sa, anu mimar~…æi kina r~…æan ¶iwan u tanajaaj a sapimar~…æi, anu taƒßkar~…æ mimar~…æi r~…æima a ¶a ku tad…ômaw mimar~…æi, kina mar~…æi tan…ô≈ã misar~…æiwr~…æiw tata ¶uwa a mipakaƒß mimar~…æi atu kur~…æukur~…æud atu mikir~…æi tu mar~…æi, kian mar~…æi kan ¶a a mit…ôm…ô ¶ tu tumaan amimar~…æiaj, anu mimar~…æi tu matat…ôm…ô ¶ mipur~…æuƒß tu tumaaj a mimar~…æiaj, kja makaar~…æa tu sapit…ôm…ô ¶. kina r~…æan ¶iw i kitaki u sakajdiƒßan nu katuudaj mimar~…æi kujnian, nama **** a miƒß ¶aan mar~…æi≈ãatu aojunƒßui mar~…æar~…æu ¶…ôk a mitad…ôm…ô ¶aj a mammar~…æian, i tini pakatur~…æuaj a ƒßun nu ur~…æi ¶ makawait tu mar~…æi tusaaj ku nikaar~…æaan tu nikat…ôm…ô ¶an, anu i tur~…æuaj nu ƒßun a ur~…æi ¶ miwait tur~…æuaj ku nikawaitan a nikaar~…æaan. anu mamin matad…ôm…ô ¶ sa, anu ¶ima ku sajadaƒßaj ani waitan wjda ku kata, anu mar~…æ…ô ¶ad ku nikaar~…æaan sa misatanaju a ¶a midad…ôm…ô ¶, anu mimar~…æi ƒß…ôn, u mimar~…æiaj tan…ô≈ã matur~…æin mimar~…æi (ƒßajni pimar~…æi i r~…æar~…æad, pasajni i udip nu r~…æima sa) kja mar~…æi≈ãatu madupa a mipap…ôr~…æi i dumaan a tad…ômaw, anu pap…ôr~…æi i dumaan a mimar~…æijaj, anu mu ¶ur~…æir~…æ (ja mimar~…æiaj sa, anu ¶aaj pimar~…æi mu ¶ur~…æir~…æ a ¶a tu mipimar~…æiaj kina kakawawan), anu p…ôr~…æiƒß…ôn ku mar~…æi atu kina tusa mimar~…æi sa pat…ôr~…æa ¶aj kujnian. nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ
